commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a shared runtime-alias auth-label predicate, uses it in both /status renderers, and adds regression coverage for env API-key labels being shadowed by active claude-cli OAuth.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +93. Total +128 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main only falls back from unknown selected auth and otherwise prefers a concrete env API-key label over the active equivalent runtime alias auth. I did not run a live gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is indicated; the next step is maintainer review after CI and contributor-provided real behavior proof because the patch has no concrete line-level defect from this review.
